summary: The notebook has two notes: a foundations course note on gradient descent and a paper reading of the Transformer, together covering optimization basics and attention-based deep learning.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: A gradient-descent course note covers the core update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Only one foundations note exists; no notes yet on linear models, generalization, or supervised-learning pipelines.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: The Transformer reading note explains scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, and positional encodings with WMT BLEU results.
areas.gap: No notes on CNNs, RNNs, training dynamics, normalization, or other architectures beyond the Transformer.

areas.label: Efficient Inference
areas.coverage: The Transformer note flags quadratic attention cost and cites KV caching and speculative decoding as downstream research directions.
areas.gap: No dedicated notes on KV-cache design, speculative decoding, quantization, or serving systems yet.

areas.label: Systems
areas.coverage: The Transformer note identifies inference-time efficiency of attention as a first-order systems problem.
areas.gap: No standalone systems notes on batching, serving, or hardware-aware model deployment.
